title: polygala dolichocarpa
intro: Polygala dolichocarpa, also known as Chinese polygala or Yuan zhi, is a type of flowering plant in the milkwort family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Chinese polygala is often prepared as a herbal tea or extract, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicinal formulas.
